flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Toccoa Falls College fell 24% between 2021 and 2024 (42.0% → 31.9%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Toccoa Falls College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($21.5k → $23.9k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Toccoa Falls College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($21.5k → $23.9k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Toccoa Falls College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.2% → 0.0%).
